name: Symbiotic Aberration
descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Also grants other Awakeners the same amount of Aliemus. Manic Persona: The amount of Aliemus gained is tripled

patch.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Grants other Awakeners an equal amount of Aliemus, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn. Manic Persona: Obtains 3x the amount of Aliemus, inflict {Vulnerable} on all enemies for 1 turn
